warnings: This 1:25 detail plan of WC.2 occupies its own sheet A-12; unlike WC.1 (which shares its sheet A-10 with the fixture symbol legend and mount-height strip), this sheet contains only the WC.2 plan — no siblings on this page.
This room corresponds to ห้องน้ำ2 on the architectural floor plan (หน้า06); this sheet is the scaled 1:25 detail superseding that floor-plan-level box.
Section cut arrows '1' and '2' printed on this plan reference the section views on A-13 (หน้า15) — see _หน้า15_wc2_side_profile1.json / _หน้า15_wc2_side_profile2.json.

The toilet fixture in this room is labeled 'WC.1' on the plan (สัญลักษณ์ ห้องน้ำแบบนั่งราบ) even though the room itself is named ห้องน้ำ2/WC.2 — read faithfully as printed; likely means WC.2 (the room label, per floor plan A-04) actually uses a WC.1-type (นั่งราบ/sit-down) fixture, which is plausible since the fixture symbol table (A-10) defines WC.2 as นั่งยอง (squat-type) and this plan's overall fixture layout (LAV.2, PH., TR., no HS./SP./SW. explicitly labeled near WC.1) differs somewhat from WC.1's own room layout (หน้า12) — flagged for human review rather than silently reconciled.
